title: Olovin

{{Quote|Prepare interdiction.|General Wedge Antilles, during the battle in the Duro system|<ref name="Final" />}}
'''''Olovin''''' was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]], produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], that accompanied [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] on a [[Battle of the Duro system|feint]] in the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. ''Olovin'' helped trap the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] with its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]], which allowed the Galactic Alliance to [[Battle at Fondor|take]] the planet [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] with little resistance.

==Description==
Produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]],<ref name="TNEGVV" /> ''Olovin'' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]<ref name="TCSWE" /><ref name="ForSomeReasonWeNeedTwo418Entries" /> equipped with [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well generators]].<ref name="Final" />

==History==
During the later stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]],<ref name="Final" /> ''Olovin'' was assigned to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> who commanded the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']].<ref name="Final" /> In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' places the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] nineteen [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the start of the novel, and the [[Battle of Esfandia]]—which occurs at the end of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''—two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the start of ''The Unifying Force''. Thus, the Battles of [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Yuuzhan'tar]] are approximately three months apart. The Battle of Yuuzhan'tar occurs in [[Great ReSynchronization|64:6]], according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', so the Battle of Esfandia and the end of ''Reunion'' must therefore occur no earlier than 64:3, the first month of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. Thus, ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'', which occurs between ''Reunion'' and ''The Unifying Force'', must fall in 29 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], despite ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' placing it in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].</ref> ''Olovin'' and other Galactic Alliance [[Warship/Legends|warships]] accompanied Antilles and ''Mon Mothma'' to the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]], where they [[Battle of the Duro system|engaged]] the Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] elements stationed there in a feint. After the Galactic Alliance forces had fought for a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], and after Yuuzhan Vong reinforcements had arrived from the Yuuzhan Vong–held world of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], ''Olovin'', along with ''Mon Mothma''<ref name="Final" /> and the fellow Immobilizer 418 [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]<ref name="ForSomeReasonWeNeedTwo418Entries" /><ref name="Ithor">{{CSWECite|II|305|''Memory of Ithor''}}</ref> ''[[Memory of Ithor]]'', activated its [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] well generators. The positioning of the trio of [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdicting]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] prevented the Yuuzhan Vong forces, which were arrayed around Duro, from leaving the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] as long as the interdictor line held. With the Yuuzhan Vong forces stuck at Duro, General [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] was able to lead a Galactic Alliance force to [[Battle at Fondor|victory]] over the minimal Yuuzhan Vong guard the invaders had left at Fondor and its [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|shipyards]].<ref name="Final" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Olovin'' appeared in [[2003]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy|''The Final Prophecy'']], written by [[Greg Keyes]] as a part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series of novels.<ref name="Final" />

*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
